name: APT31
brief: Prompted Gemini with an expert-cybersecurity persona to automate vulnerability analysis and generate targeted testing plans — in one case trialing Hexstrike MCP tooling and directing the model to analyze RCE, WAF-bypass, and SQL-injection results against specific US targets. GTIG
ttpMd:
**LLM-assisted vulnerability research** T1595 - Active Scanning

T1587.004 - Develop Capabilities: Exploits

Agentic/MCP-assisted offensive testing
